# Builder Tier - $99/month

## Short Description
Get weekly personalized feedback and a supportive community to validate and launch your first ideas. Everything a beginner needs to go from concept to first customers.

---

## Full Description

**What You Get:**

• **Weekly 30-Min Async Coaching (Loom Videos)** — Receive personalized video feedback on your progress, ideas, and roadblocks. No scheduling hassles—watch and implement on your time.

• **Private Discord Community** — Connect with fellow builders testing their first ideas. Share wins, ask questions, and build real relationships with people in the same boat.

• **Monthly Group Q&A Call** — Join live sessions where you can ask anything. Hear how others are solving similar problems and get unstuck faster.

• **AI Prompt Templates Library** — Access 50+ ready-to-use prompts for content, copywriting, product development, and launch planning. Skip the learning curve and start producing results immediately.

• **Structured Validation Framework** — Get the exact process to test if your idea has real demand before wasting time building.

---

## Why This Tier?

You're past the "wondering if I should start" phase but not sure what to build or how to validate it. This tier removes the guesswork and keeps you accountable with real feedback from someone who's been there.

No fluff. No waiting for answers. Just what works.

---

## Call to Action

**Ready to test your idea with a real coach in your corner?**

[Join the Builder Tier]

*First month comes with a 1-on-1 strategy call to make sure we're aligned on your goals.*

# Gumroad Product Listing: Founder Tier

## Product Title
**Founder Tier: 1:1 Strategy & Community Access ($249/mo)**

---

## Short Description
Get direct access to personalized strategy calls, priority support, and custom AI prompt engineering to accelerate your product launches. Join an exclusive community of active builders shipping products every month.

---

## Full Description

### What You Get

**Direct Strategy Support**
- Bi-weekly 1:1 strategy calls (30 minutes each) to solve your biggest launch challenges
- Personalized guidance tailored to your specific product and market
- Accountability check-ins to keep momentum between calls

**Lightning-Fast Support**
- Priority Discord support with 24-48 hour guaranteed response times
- Direct access to me when you're stuck on critical issues
- Beat the queue and get answers while they still matter

**Custom AI Leverage**
- Custom prompt engineering for your unique workflows
- Save weeks of AI learning curve by getting battle-tested prompts
- Adapt proven templates to your specific use cases

**Learn From Real Success**
- Access to complete case study library (launches, strategies, failures & wins)
- Templates and frameworks used in actual $10K+ product launches
- Study what worked, what didn't, and why—so you don't repeat mistakes

**Monthly Group Mastermind**
- Peer-to-peer learning with 10-15 other active builders
- Share wins, brainstorm challenges, and build relationships
- Mastermind-style accountability that pushes faster progress

---

## Why This Tier

**You're an active builder.** You're not thinking about launching products someday—you're launching them this month. You need real strategy support, not courses. You want to move fast without reinv

# Accelerator: Fast-Track Your AI Product to Market

**Short Description:**
Get weekly 1:1 strategy calls, hands-on live coding sessions, and direct access to an experienced founder who's been exactly where you are. Skip the trial-and-error phase and launch with confidence.

---

## What You Get

**Weekly 1:1 Strategy Calls (45 min)**
- Personalized guidance on your biggest blockers
- Real-time problem-solving for technical and business decisions
- Accountability to keep momentum between sessions

**Live Coding Sessions (2x/month)**
- Watch over my shoulder as I build AI features from scratch
- Learn my battle-tested patterns and shortcuts
- Ask questions in real-time and see solutions applied immediately

**White-Glove Prompt Customization**
- I'll craft, test, and optimize custom prompts for your specific use case
- Leverage my playbook of proven LLM techniques
- Get prompts that actually convert, not generic templates

**Direct Slack Access**
- Real answers within hours, not days
- Quick wins and rapid iteration support
- No gatekeeping—ask what you need, when you need it

**Pre-Launch Review & Feedback**
- Ship with confidence knowing your product has been vetted
- Spot blind spots before your users do
- Get actionable feedback that moves the needle

---

## Who This Is For

You're a solopreneur or small co-founder team ready to scale. You've got traction (or close to it), but you're hitting complexity walls—whether that's integrating AI, optimizing prompts, architecting your backend, or deciding what to build next. You value direct mentorship over course content. You want to compress months of learning into weeks.

---

## The Real
